metadata.description: HUD+ — enhanced fork of Claude HUD with cross-machine session sync tools: chats counter with loss sentinel, chat backup/recover, ACPEC auto commit+push, and submodule push reminders

plugins.name: claude-hud
plugins.description: Real-time statusline showing context usage, git status, active tools, agents, and todos — plus opt-in session sync tools (chats line, backup/recover, ACPEC auto-sync).
